calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2018 Continued To Jan-16-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Prime Ascot, L.P., Prime Ascot Acquisition, Llc, Prime Administration Llc And Dba Blue Rock Village Apartments' Motion To Transfer Action To Solano County Superior Court
Off Calendar Oct-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Charles Perry, esq. (415-800-3937) for Plaintiff/opposing party Leaser and Wongsaroj via courtcall.
Matthew S. Constantino, esq. (925-734-0990) of Clapp, Moroney, Vucinich, Beeman & Scheley for Defendants/Moving party Prime Ascot, L.P., Prime Ascot Acquisition, Llc, Prime Administration Llc And Dba Blue Rock Village Apartments.

Hearing is held re: practical and legal matter of having matter heard in Solano County, non-party witness live and work in Solano County, property in Solano County, number of properties aroung the state impacted by action. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant Prime Ascot, L.P., Prime Ascot Acquisition, LLC, Prime Administration LLC And Dba Blue Rock Village Apartments' Motion To Transfer Action To Solano County Superior Court is Taken Under Submission. Both Counsel to submit proposed orders. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2018 Continued To Nov-21-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Oct-09-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PRIME ASCOT, L.P., PRIME ASCOT ACQUISITION, LLC, PRIME ADMINISTRATION LLC AND DBA BLUE ROCK VILLAGE APARTMENTS' MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION TO SOLANO COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT.

Continued to October 17, 2018 at 9:30am in Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court. That department hears all matters relating to damage to real property other than construction disputes. All future law and motion matters in this case must be noticed to be heard in Department 501.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
